title: Signal From Kharon-9 - Dormant Array Wake Beat Scene
prompt: Story: Signal From Kharon-9 (signal-from-kharon-9) | Hook: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies. | Subgenre: cosmic horror | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array | Villain: The Quiet Orbit | Villain worldview: Human choices are measurable noise in a larger equation. | Motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Beat: Dormant Array Wake (Contact). Narrative: A telemetry packet arrives in Telegram with tomorrow's timestamp and your exact opening message.. Render an immersive scene frame with spatial depth and hidden clue affordance.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
